textByHash.372e34cb3c5b9a7ae14b3d0e2ef2ab7b3e8f25d3: Hello, surface-dweller. Can I help you?
textByHash.500caaca89ad2e683eced3aa4c5ff13ee9d28124: The council posted me here to guard this new tunnel. I can also give you directions through the tunnels. A hero like you is always welcome in our mines!
textByHash.971ad4e3925df1b21b067c24b3e2a5e718567aee: Of course! You're always welcome in our mines!
